name: HightouchConnector
description: Connects to the Hightouch Reverse-ETL / Composable CDP REST API (Workspaces, Sources, Models, Destinations, Syncs, Sync Runs, Sequences, Events) using a workspace API token. Supports inventory sync, on-demand pipeline triggers, and Customer Studio event ingest.

install_fields.label: Hightouch API Token
install_fields.help: From Hightouch → Settings → API Keys (workspace-scoped) or Settings → Personal Access Tokens (user-scoped). Sent as `Authorization: Bearer <api_token>` on every request.

install_fields.label: Hightouch API Base URL
install_fields.help: Override for Hightouch sandbox or a regional endpoint. Leave blank to use the default.

install_fields.label: Rate Limit (requests/min)
install_fields.help: Soft client-side cap. Hightouch enforces its own per-token cap server-side; the client retries 429s with exponential backoff regardless.

apis.name: Install Connector
apis.description: Validates api_token is present and persists install config. Does NOT call the API.

apis.name: Authorize (API Key)
apis.description: API-key flow — no OAuth exchange. Returns a TokenInfo whose access_token is the configured api_token for ABI symmetry.

apis.name: Health Check
apis.description: Verifies Hightouch API connectivity by probing GET /workspaces.

apis.name: Sync Inventory into KB
apis.description: Pages through /sources, /models, /destinations, /syncs and ingests each as a NormalizedDocument into the Shielva knowledge base.

apis.name: List Workspaces
apis.description: GET /workspaces — list workspaces accessible to the API token.

apis.name: List Sources
apis.description: GET /sources — list configured warehouse / DB sources in the workspace.

apis.name: Get Source
apis.description: GET /sources/{id} — fetch a single source by numeric id.

apis.name: List Models
apis.description: GET /models — list SQL / audience model definitions in the workspace.

apis.name: List Syncs
apis.description: GET /syncs — list sync (model → destination) pipelines, optionally filtered by model or destination.

apis.name: Create Sync
apis.description: POST /syncs — create a new sync from a raw payload (slug, modelId, destinationId, configuration, schedule).

apis.name: Run Sync (Trigger)
apis.description: POST /syncs/{id}/trigger — kick off a sync run. `full_resync=true` forces a full re-sync of all rows.

apis.name: List Sync Runs
apis.description: GET /syncs/{id}/runs — list historical run attempts for a sync.

apis.name: Get Sync Run
apis.description: GET /syncs/{sid}/runs/{rid} — fetch a single sync run by id.

apis.name: List Sequences
apis.description: GET /sequences — list orchestrated multi-step sync sequences.

apis.name: Send Event
apis.description: POST /events — forward a single Customer Studio event envelope (userId, anonymousId, event, properties, timestamp).
